case_title: PALAZZO, MARCELLO VS PRONTITO PLUMBING C/O LIONEL MORAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALAZZO, MARCELLO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRONTITO PLUMBING  C/O LIONEL MORAN $2,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,620.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTIFIED MAIL TO LIONEL MORAN, PRONTITO PLUMBING RETURNED UNCLAIMED;
